diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@
     in_channels = weight_shape[1]

     model = WeatherUNet(in_channels=in_channels, out_channels=2,

                         base_channels=base_channels)

-    model.load_state_dict(state_dict)

+    model.load_state_dict(state_dict, strict=True)

     model.eval().to(device)

     return model, in_channels

 

@@ -63,12 +63,15 @@
         if not os.path.exists(ckpt):

             print(f"Skipping missing {ckpt}")

             continue

-        model, ch = load_model(ckpt, device)

-        if ch == 8:

-            models.append(model)

-            print(f"Loaded {ckpt} (ch={ch})")

-        else:

-            print(f"Skipping {ckpt} (in_channels={ch})")

+        try:

+            model, ch = load_model(ckpt, device)

+            if ch == 8:

+                models.append(model)

+                print(f"Loaded {ckpt} (ch={ch})")

+            else:

+                print(f"Skipping {ckpt} (in_channels={ch})")

+        except Exception as e:

+            print(f"Skipping {ckpt} due to error: {e}")

 

     if not models:

         model, ch = load_model(args.checkpoint, device)
